title: Record: Complementary Training + Backoff N-gram Mixer — 0.4377 BPB
body:
## Summary

- **0.4377 BPB** (2-seed mean 0.4379, std 0.0002)
- Reproduction of PR #803's complementary training approach on 8x NVIDIA L20Z (H100 equivalent)
- Seeds: 1337 → 0.4377, 42 → 0.4380
- Training: 7,003 steps in 600s, eval: 450s (within 10-min budget)
- Artifact: ~15.9MB (under 16MB limit)

## Key Techniques

1. **Complementary Training** (COMPLEMENT_ALPHA=0.5): bigram-weighted loss reweighting
2. **BackoffNgramMixer**: orders 2-10, entropy-adaptive alpha mixing
3. **Legal score-first AdamW TTT**: 4 epochs, lr=5e-4, freeze first 2 blocks
4. **Stride=128**: negligible BPB impact, halves eval time

## Acknowledgment

Based on PR #803 by @pentxayc. Core innovation of complementary training is their contribution.

## Test plan

- [x] Verified on 2 seeds (1337, 42) with consistent results
- [x] Training completes within 10-min wallclock
- [x] Eval completes within 10-min budget (450s)
- [x] Artifact under 16MB
- [x] All TTT is legal score-first (tokens scored before any update)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
